title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at NHPC

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at NHPC
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
